name: 反擊型（以理服人＋身份碾壓）
description: 面對嘲諷和威脅時的精準反擊，語言簡潔有力，往往伴隨身份或實力的揭露。給觀眾帶來即時爽感。
tags: 釋放爽感，觀眾情緒宣洩

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: I want to make money, but not at the cost of someone's life. When it comes to cosmetics, the number one thing is safety. Number two is actual results. / My husband is none of your business. / Who do you think you are? It'd be even easier to crush your whole family.
examples.context: 釋放爽感，觀眾情緒宣洩
